title: Wields Two Weapons at Once
summary: You bear steel with both hands, ready to take on any foe.
tiers: Tier 3: Dual Medium Wield or Precise Cut
Tier 6: Disarming Attack or Spin Attack
gm_intrusions: A blade snaps in two or a weapon flies loose from its bearer’s grip.
text: You bear steel with both hands, ready to take on any foe.
